summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Products Import/Export feature. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend UI fully functional with import modal, export actions, bulk delete, tabs filtering, and product form. Fixed missing fields in product serializer (destination, brand, barcode, etc.).

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions - minor Recharts sizing issue

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: serialize_product() was missing destination, brand, barcode, reference_type, quantity_type, is_composite, components, total_sold fields
Import CSV parsing handles multiple encodings (utf-8, utf-8-sig, latin-1)
Bulk delete properly validates empty product_ids array
Export endpoints return proper CSV with Content-Disposition headers
All data-testid attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: 2 products exist: Ordinateur Portable (REF-001), Clavier USB (REF-002)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Products Import/Export feature fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_products_import_export.py cover: list products, export template, export stock, export prices, import CSV, bulk delete, CRUD operations, authentication. Test user: test@example.com / Test123!, Company ID: 697549d9ee757048d6c9c8aa

backend: GET /api/products/ - List all products with new fields (destination, brand, etc.)
GET /api/products/export/stock - Export stock state as CSV
GET /api/products/export/prices - Export price list as CSV
POST /api/products/import - Import products from CSV file
Authentication required for all endpoints (returns 403 without token)
frontend: Products page loads with KPI cards (Stock le plus bas, Valeur du Stock, Le plus rentable, Article le plus vendu)
Tabs filtering (Tous les articles, Pour la vente, Pour l'achat, Matière première)
Import modal with download template button, file upload, delimiter/encoding selectors
Action dropdown with export prix, export stock, fusionner, supprimer, tout supprimer
Product form modal with all fields (titre, référence, description, taxes, unité, catégorie, marque, destination, type, prix, stock)
